snippets.comment: Took Calc 1 and 2 with Prof Raz. I am very thankful for him as I struggled with math before hand. His teaching style was amazing for me. He makes everything simple and clear. He teaches you exactly what is needed for his exams. He is very clear on what is needed to know. I had an amazing time. Very
Professor Verzeanu makes this class a breeze. As long as you study the practice tests, you're guaranteed an easy A. Unstuck study is a great tool to supplement your prep.

Class is based off 3 exam and final, and he drops lowest exam. No homework and gives practice tests that are very similar to the actual test. He teaches everything super well and makes everything easy to understand. Worth taking, even if you need to waitlist.

Probably one of the easiest A's for a math class i've ever received. This class if very easy to coast through as long as you study for the exams diligently. Professor Verzeanu's class is very appealing in this regard.

I absolutely love this guy, he made Calc 2 as clear and as easy as possible for us students. If you do his practice tests you will absolutely pass, he's also very easygoing and gives extra credit for tests. If you have a chance to take him, even if it's in person, DO IT. You won't regret it.

CRAZYHe gives the option to not come to class,but he doesn't let students know if there is a change in schedule.Exam is on R but he changed it to Tues,AND HE DIDN'TSENDOUTANYEMAILSTATINGACHANGE.emailed him that I cant change my plans like that & he blamed meTeaches shortcuts so you will have a hard
Take him. Super easy class. You do need to study when you go to the third midterm exam. Just practice with his study guide and you'll get an A.
